Uses of Class
io.bloviate.gen.ChildKeyComponentGenerator.Builder

Packages that use ChildKeyComponentGenerator.Builder
Package
Description
io.bloviate.gen
 

  • Uses of ChildKeyComponentGenerator.Builder in io.bloviate.gen

    Methods in io.bloviate.gen that return ChildKeyComponentGenerator.Builder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ChildKeyComponentGenerator.Builder
    ChildKeyComponentGenerator.Builder.cardinality(ChildCardinality cardinality)
    The ChildCardinality that supplies each parent's child count.
    ChildKeyComponentGenerator.Builder
    ChildKeyComponentGenerator.Builder.cycle(int cycle)
    For a parent-component generator (i.e. when ChildKeyComponentGenerator.Builder.sequence() is not used), the size (cardinality) of this parent dimension — the cycle term in start + ((parentIndex / repeat) % cycle), which must match the parent's own cycle.
    ChildKeyComponentGenerator.Builder
    ChildKeyComponentGenerator.Builder.repeat(long repeat)
    For a parent-component generator (i.e. when ChildKeyComponentGenerator.Builder.sequence() is not used), the number of consecutive parents that share this dimension's value — i.e. the product of the sizes of all parent dimensions nested inside this one (mirrors CompositeKeyComponentGenerator, and must match the parent's own repeat).
    ChildKeyComponentGenerator.Builder
    ChildKeyComponentGenerator.Builder.sequence()
    Switches this generator into sequence mode: it emits the child's 1-based sequence number within its parent (start + positionWithinParent, so start = 1 yields 1, 2, 3, ...).
    ChildKeyComponentGenerator.Builder
    ChildKeyComponentGenerator.Builder.start(int start)
    The base value, inclusive.
